projects.title: Project One
projects.description: A web application that helps users manage their daily tasks efficiently with a clean, intuitive interface.

projects.title: ServeLink
projects.description: An e-commerce platform with real-time inventory management and seamless checkout experience.

projects.title: BookSwap
projects.description: System Analysis and Design course project: A platform to buy and sell used books, featuring online publishing, audiobooks, an AI assistant to summarize books, community groups, and P2P chat.

projects.title: FindYourPain
projects.description: A UIU tentative exam routine finder tool that helps students locate and visualize their exam schedules with conflict warnings.
